CONTENT.Honours: IndividualSlovak Super Liga Player of the Month: February/March 2021Slovak Super Liga Goal of the Month: August 2020, September 2020Slovak Super Liga Team of the Season: 2020-21Slovak Super Liga U-21 Team of the Season: 2020-21
CONTENT.Club career: He signed for the Czech First League side Karviná from Zamora in 2017. He scored his first goal for them on 24 September in their 2–1 home win against Zbrojovka Brno.On 7 February 2019, Ramirez was loaned out to Senica for the rest of the season.On 23 July 2021, Ramirez signed a 5 year contract with the Ukrainian champions Dynamo Kyiv.On 30 January 2022 he went to Sporting Gijón on loan.
CONTENT.External links: Eric Ramírez – Czech First League statistics at Fotbal DNES (in Czech)Eric Ramírez at SoccerwayEric Ramírez at UAF and archived FFU page (in Ukrainian)Eric Ramírez profile on the MFK Karviná official website
CONTENT.Career statistics: As of 17 April 2024As of match played 30 June 2024Scores and results list Venezuela's goal tally first, score column indicates score after each Ramírez goal.
CONTENT.International career: He made his debut for Venezuela national football team on 13 October 2020 in a World Cup qualifier against Paraguay. He substituted Cristian Cásseres Jr. in the 89th minute.

SUMMARY: Eric Kleybel Ramírez Matheus (born 20 November 1998) is a Venezuelan professional footballer who plays as a forward for Tigre on loan from Dynamo Kyiv.
